hotPath: directional range rejection before point LOS

worstCaseComplexity.gameplayPerception: unchanged O(candidate stimuli) with bounded point-LOS preparation; candidates outside guaranteed directional range now stop before point LOS
worstCaseComplexity.selectedUnitRaster: unchanged O(cells in the explicitly requested current-view field)

mainThreadWork: one scalar early range comparison before point LOS
optional rear sampling factor only when below 1
no new traversal, query or recurring callback
sharedPreparedData: calculateAttentionVisualRangeFactor shared by early rejection and visibility quality
existing SelectedUnitVisibilityField only while the current-view layer is enabled

cacheOwnerKeyLimit.selectedUnitFieldOwnership: existing per-state latest requested unit fields

invalidationRevisions: attention mode, focus direction and profile values
memoryEstimate: no persistent runtime structure added; existing typed arrays, texture, point cache and field cache are reused
staleResultRejection: not applicable; no asynchronous path added
teardown: unchanged symmetric PixiVisibilityHeatmapRenderer.destroy; no worker, timer or listener added

beforeMetrics.contract: enforced live browser thresholds are the baseline and may not be weakened

requiredChecks: Live Windows AI Browser Performance with enforcement enabled
remainingPerformanceRisks: the existing selected-unit visibility field remains an explicit full field when the user enables the layer; this PR adds no rebuild trigger or extra field
hosted headless full-application gate has shown unrelated phase outliers across identical runs; exact-head status must still be reported without weakening thresholds
